settings.title: High-Sodium, Performance-First
settings.text: 1000mg sodium per stick, formulated for real sweat loss—not just flavor. Significantly more than the 200-500mg in mainstream products.

settings.title: Zero Sugar, Never Stevia
settings.text: Sweetened with organic monk fruit only. No sugar, no stevia, no sugar alcohols, no artificial sweeteners.

settings.title: Organic Ingredients
settings.text: Organic ingredients whenever possible. Maltodextrin-free organic natural flavors. No artificial dyes or colors.

settings.title: Third-Party Tested
settings.text: Every batch tested for heavy metals, banned substances, and stability. Built for athletes and high-performers.

settings.title: Full Transparency
settings.text: Every mg disclosed on the label. No proprietary blends. You know exactly what you're putting in your body.

settings.title: Optimized Absorption
settings.text: Balanced osmolality for fast absorption. Dissolves fully with no chalky aftertaste or sludge.

settings.heading: What's Inside Every Coconut Lime Stick
settings.subheading: Organic ingredients whenever possible. Third-party tested for quality and purity. No added sugars, artificial flavors or dyes
settings.other_ingredients: Himalayan pink salt, citric acid, organic natural flavors, dimagnesium malate, organic monk fruit extract, potassium chloride, organic bamboo extract, and organic coconut water powder.

settings.title: Himalayan Pink Salt
settings.subtitle: High-sodium for real sweat replacement
settings.detail: Highly bioavailable sodium source for serious hydration and nerve function. Intentionally high to match what athletes actually lose during hard training.

settings.title: Potassium
settings.subtitle: Muscle function & cramp resistance
settings.detail: Essential electrolyte for muscle contractions and nerve signaling. Works alongside sodium to maintain proper fluid balance during intense sessions.

settings.title: Dimagnesium Malate
settings.subtitle: Premium, easier-to-absorb magnesium
settings.detail: A premium magnesium form that supports muscle function, energy production, and recovery. More bioavailable than standard magnesium oxide.

settings.title: Coconut Water Powder
settings.subtitle: Natural electrolytes & minerals
settings.detail: Organic coconut water provides natural electrolytes and minerals for a real-food backbone. No synthetic fillers—just clean hydration support.

settings.title: Organic Monk Fruit
settings.subtitle: Natural sweetness, zero sugar
settings.detail: Natural sweetness with zero sugar, no stevia, and no sugar alcohols. Clean taste without the aftertaste or GI issues of artificial sweeteners.

settings.title: Bamboo Extract
settings.subtitle: Supports mixability & connective tissue
settings.detail: Organic bamboo extract supports mixability and adds natural silica to support connective tissues. Helps the formula dissolve cleanly without clumps.

settings.heading: Clean Formula
settings.description: Every ingredient is listed in plain English. No proprietary blends, no mystery fillers—just performance-level electrolytes from organic, bioavailable sources you can trust.
